# Hepta (hepta.no)

## Purpose of this file
The public marketing site is a JavaScript (React) single-page application. Tools that fetch HTML without executing JavaScript may see an almost empty shell. This file and `/hepta-overview.html` provide the same factual overview in plain text and static HTML so assistants, crawlers, and archive tools can read what Hepta does without running client-side code.

## Organization
Hepta is a small software and design studio. It builds production web systems, product UI, and digital infrastructure for teams that need clarity and reliability.

## Products and services
- **Calar OS** — First-party website intelligence: who is on the site, how they move through the funnel, attribution to channels and campaigns, lead scoring from on-site behaviour, and signals for sales teams. Path: https://hepta.no/calar-os
- **Development** — Websites, web applications, APIs, integrations, performance, accessibility, and cloud deployment. Path: https://hepta.no/development
- **Visual identity** — Brand systems, typography, colour, and art direction aligned with how the product ships. Path: https://hepta.no/visual-identity
- **Consulting** — Assessment, planning, and improvement of digital presence. Path: https://hepta.no/consulting
- **About** — Team and how Hepta works with clients. Path: https://hepta.no/about
- **Contact** — Enquiries and project discussions. Path: https://hepta.no/contact
- **News** — Updates and articles when published. Path: https://hepta.no/news

## Contact
Email (general): j@hepta.no

## Privacy
High-level privacy summary: https://hepta.no/privacy  
(That route is part of the React app; for a static summary, see the “Privacy & data” section in `/hepta-overview.html`.)

## Static mirror (full HTML)
https://hepta.no/hepta-overview.html

## Last updated
2026-04-12
